name: Vaibhav Sharma
title: Backend / Systems Engineering Student
tagline: I build backend systems, developer tools, and systems-level projects focused on reliability and security.
summary: Systems-oriented engineering student focused on backend infrastructure and production-grade systems. My work spans API services, database-driven applications, and systems-level tooling — from Spring Boot scheduling engines to Linux sandboxing using seccomp and namespaces.
philosophy: Good systems are predictable, maintainable, and resilient under real-world constraints. I focus on building backend services that handle edge cases gracefully, minimize operational complexity, and remain understandable for the engineers who maintain them.

bullets: Built an end-to-end AI music generation system integrating multiple ML models for audio generation, lyric synthesis, and genre classification.
Developed a Flask-based backend API orchestrating MusicGen, GPT-based lyric models, and YAMNet embeddings.
Implemented model preloading and fallback inference paths to reduce initialization latency and improve inference reliability.
Built Flutter UI modules for a production mobile application serving 8,000+ users.
Implemented event feed and real-time chat interface features using Flutter and Dart.
Diagnosed and resolved 18+ stability issues across two production releases in collaboration with backend and design teams.
